calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-03-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Frank Fahy Appellant/Cross Defendant/Plaintiff present.
Respondant/Cross Complainant/Defendant Andrew Kevin Horn also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Respondant/Cross Complainant/Defendant Andrew Kevin Horn testifies on his own behalf.

Appellant/Cross Defendant/Plaintiff Frank Fahy testifies on his own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. No exhibits filed.

VJ Wallace P. Douglass, Clerk: Vicki Mack, Not Reported (Dept. 303)
